prestazioni: LT2 6.2L V8 (engine code: LT2) forced induction via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 106mm inducer, and 88mm exducer, paired with a custom 4.0-inch titanium-aluminide turbine housing (T4 divided inlet) and 1.15 A/R ratio for optimized spool on the LT2’s 11.5:1 compression ratio. Supporting mods include a billet aluminum intake manifold from ProCharger with 1,000cc ID1000 injectors from Fuel Injector Clinic, and a dual-core 40-row intercooler from PWR with 3.5-inch charge pipes and silicone couplers from Vibrant Performance.

Full 3.15-inch stainless steel exhaust system from Corsa Performance with quad 4.5-inch carbon fiber tips, featuring 409-grade mandrel-bent tubing and merge collectors for optimized scavenging. The system deletes the factory NPP valves and replaces them with electronic cutouts from Borla for on-demand backpressure control, paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU tune with flex-fuel capability and individual cylinder trimming for the LT2’s active fuel management.

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 24-way adjustable compression and rebound damping, featuring 8-position adjustable ride height and spherical top mounts for the C8’s mid-engine chassis. Front and rear sway bars from Hotchkis Sport Suspension (28mm front, 25mm rear) with adjustable end links, paired with polyelastomer bushings from Energy Suspension for the control arms and subframe. Brembo GT 6-piston front and 4-piston rear calipers with 410mm two-piece rotors (slotted and dimpled) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for track use.
estetica: Widebody conversion kit from Rocket Bunny (Pandem) for the C8 Stingray, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with 2-inch extensions, rear quarter panels with 3-inch flares, and a custom carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts. The kit includes a 3D-scanned front splitter with adjustable canards and a rear wing with a 1,200mm span and dual-element design for high-speed stability.

Custom carbon fiber engine cover from Seibon Carbon with a clear-coated weave finish, paired with a titanium exhaust shield from APR Performance. The engine bay is further enhanced with a carbon fiber radiator support panel from VIS Racing and a custom billet aluminum oil cap from Billet Specialties, engraved with the LT2 engine code.

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara from Katzkin, featuring custom stitching in Corvette Racing Yellow and carbon fiber trim pieces from AWE Tuning. The steering wheel is replaced with a suede-wrapped unit from Momo (Mod. 78) with a quick-release hub, while the seats are swapped for Recaro Pole Position bucket seats with six-point harnesses from Schroth. The digital gauge cluster is recalibrated with a custom overlay from HP Tuners, displaying boost pressure, air/fuel ratio, and oil temperature.
